confidence_rationale: Task completion and timing clearly visible, though reverse direction phase partially obscured by camera angles. No obvious penalties observed but some object movements difficult to track precisely.
cannot_determine: Exact timing of reverse direction initiation due to camera transitions
Precise object placement accuracy on individual pegs from overhead view
technique_summary: Solid intermediate performance with consistent technique throughout both directions. Completion time of 95 seconds falls within intermediate range (60-120s).
improvement_suggestions: Increase movement speed to reach expert timing (40-60s)
Practice more efficient object pickup to reduce individual transfer times
